title: hypochaeris cryptocephala
intro: Hypochaeris cryptocephala, also known as the smooth cat's ear or hairy false dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Hypochaeris cryptocephala include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Hypochaeris cryptocephala can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in salves and creams for topical application.
